subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-16 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Now see here! If someone were to commit a hundred offences whose harm reverts only to me, I would shut my eyes to the matter
subcodes.first_line_orig: نگاه کن من اگر کسی صد خلاف بکند که ضرش بشخص من راجع باشد چشمهایم به هم مینهم
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @human reality created in the image of God
